instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall optimize shift quality during gear changes.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall reduce engine torque during shift execution.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall smooth clutch engagement during shifting.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall control clutch pressure ramp during gear engagement.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent harsh shifts.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect harsh shift when Shift_Jerk exceeds Jerk_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF Shift_Jerk > Jerk_Limit THEN Harsh_Shift_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall adjust shift timing for smooth operation.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall delay shift execution when engine torque is unstable.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall synchronize torque reduction and clutch engagement.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall coordinate torque reduction with clutch engagement timing.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall adjust torque during downshifts.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall increase engine torque briefly during downshift synchronization.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect poor shift quality.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect shift quality fault when vibration exceeds Vibration_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF Shift_Vibration > Vibration_Limit THEN Shift_Quality_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall optimize clutch pressure for smooth shifts.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall adjust clutch pressure based on shift quality feedback.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent repeated poor shift quality.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect persistent shift quality issues when fault count exceeds Fault_Limit.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall clear shift quality faults after stable operation.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall clear shift quality fault when vibration and jerk return to normal range.

L4_requirements: IF Shift_Jerk < Jerk_Limit AND Shift_Vibration < Vibration_Limit THEN Clear_Shift_Quality_Fault
